Question 1:

package day8;

public class Person {
	String name;
	int age;
	Person(String name,int age)
	{
		this.name=name;
		this.age=age;
	}

}
class Student extends Person
{
	int marks;
	Student(String name,int age,int marks)
	{
		super(name,age);
		this.marks=marks;
	}
	void display()
	
	{
        System.out.println("Name  : " + name);
        System.out.println("Age   : " + age);
        System.out.println("Marks : " + marks);
    }


    
}


package day8;

public class StudentObject {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		
	        Student s11 = new Student("Alice", 20, 95);
	        s11.display();
	    }
	}
Question 2: Salary Calculation using this Keyword
package day8;
class Employe
{
	int id;
	String name;
	double basicSalary;
	double totalSalary;
	Employe(int id,String name,double basicSalary)
	{
		this.id=id;
		this.name=name;
		this.basicSalary=basicSalary;
	}
	 void calculateSalary()
	{
		double HRA=basicSalary*20/100;
		double bonus=basicSalary*10/100;
		 totalSalary=basicSalary+HRA+bonus;
	}
	void display()
	{
		System.out.println("id : "+id+"\n"+"Name : "+name+"\n"+"Basic Salary : "+basicSalary+"\n"+"Total Salary : "+totalSalary);
		
	}
}

public class EmployeObject {

	public static void main(String[] args) {
		// TODO Auto-generated method stub
		Employe E1=new Employe(101,"Rakshi",23456);
		E1.calculateSalary();
		E1.display();
		
		

	}

}
